# minio_s3_bucket_notification_config (Data Source)

Reads the event notification configuration of an existing S3 bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_bucket_notification_config" "example" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `queue` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--queue))

<a id="nestedatt--queue"></a>
### Nested Schema for `queue`

Read-Only:

- `arn` (String)
- `events` (List of String)
- `prefix` (String)
- `suffix` (String)
